body:

subject: Cedars-Sinai Medical Group — Your Phones Are Losing You $47K/Month

name: Director of Programs
subject: TTI + LA Family Housing — AI-Powered Veteran Housing Partnership
body:
Hello,

Total Transformation Inc. (TTI) is an AI automation company and veteran housing initiative headquartered in Los Angeles.

Our mission: house every homeless veteran in Los Angeles using a combination of AI-generated revenue and strategic real estate acquisition.

We are seeking a fiscal sponsorship partnership with LA Family Housing to unlock federal grant funding for our veteran housing program.

In exchange, TTI will deploy our AI automation system for your organization at no cost — handling case management follow-up, veteran outreach, and appointment scheduling.

Can we schedule a 20-minute call this week to explore the partnership?

Aaron T. Reddix

name: Programs Manager
subject: TTI Veteran Housing Initiative — Partnership Inquiry | Los Angeles
body:
Hello,

I am Aaron T. Reddix, CEO of Total Transformation Inc. (TTI), an AI automation company and veteran housing initiative based in Los Angeles, CA (EIN: 32-0663781).

TTI is actively seeking to partner with your program to acquire multi-family properties in Los Angeles for use as permanent supportive housing for homeless veterans.

We have identified several owner-finance opportunities in South Central LA and are pursuing SSVF and HUD-VASH funding to support acquisition and operations.

I would appreciate the opportunity to discuss how TTI can support your program's housing placement goals.

Available for a call this week at your convenience.

Aaron T. Reddix
CEO — Total Transformation Inc.
(747) 301-8586 | ceomrreddix@gmail.com
